name: Chicken Dressing Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Milk, mix soups and milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the stuffing according to the box instructions.
2. Place half of the prepared stuffing in the bottom of a 9 x 13 inch baking dish.
3. Layer the green beans, chicken, soups, mushrooms on top of the stuffing.
4. Sprinkle the remaining stuffing over the casserole.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
6. Serve with salad. This dish can be made ahead and reheated when needed.
